title: LEGO Gift Card - UK Redemption Only - Delivered by Email
features: Spread the AWESOME, give a LEGO e-Gift Card. Giving a LEGO e-Gift Card provides unlimited excitement for your friends and family.
LEGO e-Gift Cards can be used in LEGO Stores, on the LEGO website and for LEGO phone orders.
LEGO e-Gift Cards can only be redeemed in the UK.
LEGO e-Gift Cards will be delivered via Email
You can use your LEGO e-Gift Card to make full, or partial payments. Your desired amount will be deducted from your e-Gift Card balance any remaining value will stay on your LEGO e-Gift Card.
You can check the balance on your LEGO e-Gift Card on the LEGO website or in a LEGO store.
As long as there is value remaining on your LEGO e-Gift Card it will not expire.
LEGO e-Gift Cards can’t be used for purchases of LEGO products or services in other retail stores or in any LEGOLAND location.
description: Product Description Spread the AWESOME, give a LEGO® Gift Card.  Giving a LEGO Gift Card provides unlimited excitement for your friends and family. LEGO Gift Cards can be used in LEGO Stores, on LEGO.com and for LEGO phone orders. Legal Disclaimer LEGO® e-Gift Card Terms and Conditions: This e-Gift card can be used as full or partial payment for LEGO® products purchased for delivery in the UK from LEGO.com, over the phone by dialling 00800 5346 5555 or in LEGO Stores in the UK. LEGO Gift Cards and e-Gift Cards can’t be spent in conjunction with PayPal on LEGO.com. The e-Gift card cannot be used in LEGOLAND® Parks or LEGOLAND Discovery Centres or in other LEGO product retailers. The e-Gift card cannot be redeemed for cash or credit. No fees or expiry dates apply. The purchase amount will be deducted from the card balance and is accessible via LEGO.com/Gift-cards. LEGO Company Limited is not responsible for lost, stolen, or damaged cards or unauthorised use. Additional limitations may apply; see the full Terms and Conditions at LEGO.com/Gift-cards. This e-Gift card is issued by LEGO Company ltd, 33 Bath Road, Slough, Berks, SL1 3UF. The LEGO logo and the Minifigure are trademarks of the LEGO Group. ©2023
